transcript: Good morning, packaging store. May I help you?
Ah, good morning. I... I needed to conceal a crawdad.
Hmm, can't send any live or dead animals.
Oh, this is the clown again, huh?
I don't know why you're out of school today anyway, but I'm... this is getting sick and tiresome.
It can't be shipped, '[beep]' and I haven't got time to drop everything to--
